meta.title: Tinkermarket
meta.description: A sprawling marketplace at the crossroads between dimensions. Merchants and artisans from alien worlds hawk strange materials and unfamiliar craftsmanship. Acquire, combine, and craft your way through the bazaar.
aiThinkingMessages: Someone hammers metal in a distant stall...
The smell of unfamiliar spices drifts past...
A cart rattles over the cobblestones...
Voices haggle in a language you almost understand...

properties.name: material
properties.description: What substance or material this item is made from or contains

properties.name: craftable
properties.description: Whether this item can be used as an ingredient in crafting

properties.name: origin
properties.description: Which dimension or world this item or person comes from

properties.name: tone
properties.description: District tone for region entities — drives area atmosphere and pacing (abandoned, quiet, balanced, busy, dense)

properties.name: coin
properties.description: Progression meter: the player's money. Spend it for access; earned by selling.

properties.name: craft
properties.description: Progression meter: the player's crafting standing. Earned by making things; gates artisan-only areas.

tiers.name: a Journeyman
tiers.announce: *** Word travels: the makers now call you a Journeyman. Tighter lanes will make room for you. ***

tiers.name: a Master
tiers.announce: *** You are acknowledged a Master of the craft. Things hidden from lesser hands begin to show themselves. ***
